title: NW wierd summer 08
label: self-released
notes: Summer 2008 recording batch. NW may indicate "Northwest" — possibly recorded during a trip to the Pacific Northwest or simply a location tag. Primarily MP3 format.
body:
Summer 2008 recording folder. The "NW" prefix may indicate a Pacific Northwest location (Colin traveled in this period) or be a tagging convention. Primarily MP3 format, which is slightly later than the pure M4A era of early 2008.

## Confirmed tracks (from archive filenames)

- 03 flutter bugs.mp3
- 09 butterflys clumped in large groups.mp3
- disoriented.mp3
- dramdrams (deepsea jams).mp3
- drimdrims.mp3
- fabulous animals.mp3
- luvvv.m4a
- nest egg left and enhanced.mp3
- night world.mp3
- otter's water.mp3
- _(additional tracks; full count not yet confirmed)_

## Notes

Strong aquatic/animal theme: "butterflys clumped in large groups," "fabulous animals," "otter's water," "deepsea jams." Track numbering has gaps (03, 09) suggesting either missing tracks or non-sequential numbering. The word "wierd" (misspelling of "weird") appears in several of Colin's folder names as an intentional stylistic choice.
